## Repo Name Correction (verified 2026-03-30)
- FE repo actual name: `sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe` — THIS is the live ERP frontend
- BE repo actual name: `sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be` (also known as `sparkiq-gh/erp-api`)
- `sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-starter` is a TEMPLATE repo — NOT the live FE. Do not push ERP work there.
- FE issues are ENABLED (fixed 2026-03-30) — all tracking/planning/spike issues go in `sparkiq-erp-fe`, never in BE
